metadata.name: Self-replacement applies before global replacement (CR 614.15)
metadata.description: Darksteel Colossus (self-replacement: would go to graveyard -> go to library) and Rest in Peace (global: would go to graveyard -> exile) both apply when the Colossus would die. CR 614.15 mandates the self-replacement applies first. Result: Colossus goes to library; Rest in Peace no longer applies (destination changed). This tests the auto-apply behavior of a single self-replacement when competing with a non-self replacement per CR 616.1a.
metadata.generation_notes: Pending harness support for sacrificing a creature (to trigger the graveyard zone-change). Darksteel Colossus is indestructible so cannot be killed by destroy/damage. A sacrifice outlet is needed. Also requires the Colossus to be cast (not pre-placed) to register its self-replacement effect. Once sacrifice support is added to translate_player_action, this script can be approved. See corner case #17.

disputes.description: Darksteel Colossus is indestructible — cannot die via damage or destroy effects. A 'sacrifice' player action is needed to force it to the graveyard. The harness does not currently translate sacrifice actions. Pending harness enhancement.

script.step_note: Cast both cards, then sacrifice the Colossus to trigger competing replacements

actions.note: p1 casts Rest in Peace. After resolution, global graveyard->exile replacement active.
Rest in Peace resolves and enters battlefield.
Rest in Peace enters battlefield, registers global replacement.
p1 casts Darksteel Colossus. After resolution, its self-replacement (graveyard->library) is registered.
Darksteel Colossus enters battlefield. register_permanent_replacement_abilities registers its self-replacement WouldChangeZone{to:Graveyard,filter:SpecificObject}->Library.

actions.description: Both permanents on battlefield, replacements registered
actions.note: Both cards on battlefield. Two replacements active: self (library) and global (exile).
p1 sacrifices the Colossus. This forces it to the graveyard, triggering replacements. CR 614.15 + 616.1a: self-replacement auto-applied first; Colossus redirected to library.

actions.description: Darksteel Colossus in library (self-replacement applied), not in graveyard/exile
actions.note: Self-replacement applied first (CR 614.15); Colossus went to library. RiP no longer applicable. Note: sacrifice action pending harness support.
